languages.text: "Их цвета... смазаны, испорчены. Словно кто-то испортил картину, пройдясь по мазками кистью, обмакнутой в коричнево-красный..."

traits.locale_text: "Их цвета... смазаны, испорчены. Словно кто-то испортил картину, пройдясь по мазками кистью, обмакнутой в коричнево-красный..."
traits.speaker: CassiaCompanion

languages.text: "Their colours... smeared. Ruined. As if someone has defiled a painting, dragging a brush dipped in crimson-brown across the still-wet canvas..."
languages.original_text: "Их цвета... смазаны, испорчены. Словно кто-то испортил картину, пройдясь по мазками кистью, обмакнутой в коричнево-красный..."

"Their colours... smeared. Ruined. As if someone has defiled a painting, dragging a brush dipped in crimson-brown across the still-wet canvas..."

languages.text: «Sus colores... están borrosos. Estropeados. Como si alguien hubiera profanado un cuadro, arrastrando un pincel de marrón carmesí por el lienzo húmedo...».
languages.original_text: "Their colours... smeared. Ruined. As if someone has defiled a painting, dragging a brush dipped in crimson-brown across the still-wet canvas..."

traits.locale_text: «Sus colores... están borrosos. Estropeados. Como si alguien hubiera profanado un cuadro, arrastrando un pincel de marrón carmesí por el lienzo húmedo...».

languages.text: “他们的色彩……全抹乱了。毁了。就好像有人故意要糟蹋一幅画，用蘸满红褐色的画笔，拖过那尚未干透的画布……”
languages.original_text: "Their colours... smeared. Ruined. As if someone has defiled a painting, dragging a brush dipped in crimson-brown across the still-wet canvas..."

traits.locale_text: “他们的色彩……全抹乱了。毁了。就好像有人故意要糟蹋一幅画，用蘸满红褐色的画笔，拖过那尚未干透的画布……”

languages.text: « Leurs couleurs... Elles sont brouillées... gâchées. Comme si quelqu'un avait profané un tableau en barrant la toile encore humide d'un coup de pinceau brun-rouge... »
languages.original_text: "Their colours... smeared. Ruined. As if someone has defiled a painting, dragging a brush dipped in crimson-brown across the still-wet canvas..."

traits.locale_text: « Leurs couleurs... Elles sont brouillées... gâchées. Comme si quelqu'un avait profané un tableau en barrant la toile encore humide d'un coup de pinceau brun-rouge... »

languages.text: "Renkleri... Bulanmış. Mahvolmuş. Sanki biri, ıslak tuvalin üzerinde kızıl kahverengiye batırılmış bir fırçayı gezdirerek bir tabloyu kirletmiş gibi..."
languages.original_text: "Their colours... smeared. Ruined. As if someone has defiled a painting, dragging a brush dipped in crimson-brown across the still-wet canvas..."

traits.locale_text: "Renkleri... Bulanmış. Mahvolmuş. Sanki biri, ıslak tuvalin üzerinde kızıl kahverengiye batırılmış bir fırçayı gezdirerek bir tabloyu kirletmiş gibi..."

languages.text: "Ihre Farben ... beschmutzt. Ruiniert. Als hätte jemand ein Gemälde besudelt und die noch feuchte Leinwand mit rotbrauner Farbe beschmiert ..."
languages.original_text: "Their colours... smeared. Ruined. As if someone has defiled a painting, dragging a brush dipped in crimson-brown across the still-wet canvas..."

traits.locale_text: "Ihre Farben ... beschmutzt. Ruiniert. Als hätte jemand ein Gemälde besudelt und die noch feuchte Leinwand mit rotbrauner Farbe beschmiert ..."

languages.text: 「彼らの色…汚された。台無しにされた。まるで誰かが絵画を汚したかのように、まだ濡れたキャンバスに朱褐色の筆を走らせたのだ…」
languages.original_text: "Their colours... smeared. Ruined. As if someone has defiled a painting, dragging a brush dipped in crimson-brown across the still-wet canvas..."

traits.locale_text: 「彼らの色…汚された。台無しにされた。まるで誰かが絵画を汚したかのように、まだ濡れたキャンバスに朱褐色の筆を走らせたのだ…」
